layout_rules.app_container: flex h-screen w-full bg-zinc-950 text-zinc-50 overflow-hidden font-sans
layout_rules.sidebar: w-64 flex-shrink-0 flex flex-col border-r border-zinc-800 bg-zinc-950 z-10
layout_rules.main_wrapper: flex-1 flex flex-col min-w-0 bg-[#0E0E11] relative
layout_rules.header: h-14 flex-shrink-0 border-b border-zinc-800 flex items-center justify-between px-6 bg-zinc-950/80 backdrop-blur-md sticky top-0 z-10
layout_rules.right_panel_container: absolute inset-y-0 right-0 w-[450px] bg-zinc-950 border-l border-zinc-800 shadow-2xl z-50 transform transition-transform duration-300 ease-[0.16,1,0.3,1]
layout_rules.list_view: flex flex-col gap-1 w-full max-w-5xl mx-auto

component_rules.buttons: h-8 px-3 rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-zinc-400
component_rules.icon_buttons: h-8 w-8 inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-zinc-400 hover:text-zinc-50 hover:bg-zinc-800 transition-colors
component_rules.task_card: group flex flex-col gap-2 p-3 rounded-lg border border-zinc-800 bg-zinc-900/40 hover:bg-zinc-800/40 hover:border-zinc-700 transition-all cursor-pointer text-sm shadow-sm
component_rules.list_row: group flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-2.5 rounded-md border border-transparent hover:border-zinc-800 hover:bg-zinc-900/40 transition-colors cursor-pointer text-sm
component_rules.badges: inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium border border-zinc-800 bg-zinc-900 text-zinc-300
component_rules.inputs: flex h-8 w-full rounded-md border border-zinc-800 bg-transparent px-3 py-1 text-sm shadow-sm transition-colors file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-zinc-500 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-zinc-400 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50
component_rules.right_panel_inputs: w-full bg-transparent border-transparent hover:border-zinc-800 focus:border-zinc-700 rounded px-2 py-1 transition-colors text-sm

instructions_to_main_agent: IMPORTANT: Build a desktop-only (1440px+) task management system. DO NOT use mobile responsive classes (like md:flex, flex-col on mobile). Assume a fixed desktop layout.
The UI should feel exceptionally fast and dense. Use 1px borders heavily for structure, completely avoiding drop-shadows except for the slide-in panel or popovers.
Implement the 3-pane layout: 1) Fixed Sidebar (w-64) 2) Main Content (Flex-1) 3) Right sliding panel for details.
The Right Slide-in Panel is crucial. It MUST NOT be a modal that blocks the background. It should slide over the right side of the main content. User can click outside to close.
Integrate Shadcn components but style them to be tighter, squarer, and darker. E.g., Card rounded-xl -> rounded-lg, reduce paddings.
Kanban board needs horizontal scrolling. Columns should be fixed width (e.g., 320px). Task cards inside should look minimal with ID (e.g. TASK-123), title, small status icon, and an avatar.
List view (for QA/All Bugs) should look like a data table or dense list, with hover states making the entire row slightly lighter.
In the Sidebar, group navigation into 'Your Workspace' (My Tasks, Inbox) and 'Projects' (Frontend, Backend, Design).
Use Lucide-React icons extensively. Examples: Hexagon (Workspace), CircleDashed (Todo), CheckCircle2 (Done), AlertCircle (Bug/High Priority), Plus (New Issue).
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements for robust testing.
